name: checkbox-disabled
visual_summary: A disabled checkbox is a visually impaired checkbox that prevents users from interacting with it. Developers would use this component to provide feedback to the user that a checkbox is not functional or not applicable. It is commonly used in forms or in situations where users don't need to interact with the checkbox.
